methods.name: Stage-Progression
methods.rationale: Applies typical Growth → next-stage step-up multiplier (1.2x) to $703M total raised proxy.

methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Defense & Security (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 21 same-sector peers exist in Defense & Security, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

public.rationale: Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use
Public-co frontier-tech comp in Defense & Dual-use

data.narrative:
Improbable Defence, a Growth-stage defense and security company founded by Herman Narula, has raised $703M to date. The broader Defense & Security sector comprises 10 identifiable peers (2 public, 8 private), including comparable-stage companies like Anduril Industries, Scale AI, and Shield AI, though a sufficiently tight peer cohort at identical stage and valuation tier does not exist for robust median-based valuation.

Given data constraints, Stage-Progression analysis is the primary applicable method. Using total capital raised ($703M) as a valuation proxy and applying a 1.2x step-up multiplier typical of Growth-to-next-stage progression yields $844M. This method reflects the company's capital intensity and demonstrated ability to secure institutional backing, though it does not incorporate revenue, profitability, or market-specific multiples.

The triangulation analysis supports a valuation range of $717M to $970M, with a median of $844M. The wide range reflects reliance on a single method and the absence of direct comparable-company multiples in Defense & Security at this stage. Key uncertainties include revenue scale and growth trajectory (not provided), customer concentration, and regulatory/export classification risks inherent to the sector. Additional disclosure of annual recurring revenue or EBITDA would enable revenue multiple cross-checks and narrow this range materially.
